goldentweaks.error_tooltip: An error occurred that caused this tweak to fail. Please check your logs for more information.
When enabled, Leaves will no longer cast an Ambient Occlusion shadow on adjacent blocks.
goldentweaks.tweak.dark_ambient_occlusio: When enabled, the shadows between adjacent blocks will be darker.
goldentweaks.tweak.full_face_shading.too: When enabled, the lighting on block models will be applied to each individual element independent of their position in the model.
